secretaryOfState.agency: Indiana Secretary of State Business Services Division

physicalAddresses.label: Indiana Secretary of State Business Services

renewals.notes: Indiana businesses file Business Entity Reports through INBiz; LLC reports are biennial and due by the end of the anniversary month. Online for-profit fee $32 (IC 23-0.5-9-34 $20 electronic + enhanced access/portal total as shown on INBiz); paper $50 (statutory non-electronic).

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Articles of Organization: $95 online ($75 statutory electronic fee under IC 23-0.5-9-19 plus $20 enhanced access under 75 IAC 8-3-4); $100 paper/non-electronic (IC 23-0.5-9-19).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Name reservation is available through INBiz; current public fee amount remains null pending direct INBiz fee-schedule verification (portal often bot-blocked).

sources.name: Indiana Code IC 23-0.5-9-19 (Articles of Organization fees)
75 IAC 8-3-4 Articles of organization enhanced access (SOS notice PDF)
